{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323205645138BF4DD4B7F911C2617"}"},"total":100},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7581013542423626521","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"目前来说我还挺喜欢看的 因为我才看不久 顾长清和沈十六的人设和刻画很好 只是老师 你真的不考虑他们俩吗🥺我很愿意为他们买单🥺🥺🥺希望这一条被你看见"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1765095219,"group_id":"7574105399851240473","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"咩","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7bKYjIfChdXdlqzi2uEoxZIRxfKYvfw6h0Zx7nmB7H5","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/72a872aacab5475780ab82a8696d713c~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793311&x-signature=%2FgX6o%2BMFl0NTbd%2BVvY4QPYQ%2FbeE%3D","user_id":"3703632855054168","user_name":"道兼米我全都要"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3703632855054168","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7574105399851240473","book_info":{"abstract":"评分刚出，会涨的
无系统、纯破案、单元剧情（跪求先看三章，如果不好看，算我输！）     
开局就是绝境！前世法医博士，今生大虞王朝第一仵作的顾长清，因勘破一桩牵涉皇亲的命案，被诬入诏狱，受尽酷刑，等候秋后问斩。正当他以为此生无望时，一道圣旨将他从地狱捞起，扔到了人称“活阎王”的锦衣卫指挥同知——沈十六面前。
年仅二十的沈十六，眼神很冷，“城西‘剥皮画师’案，三日之内，找出真凶，你活；找不出，你就死。”面对这桩被传为“厉鬼索命”的诡案，顾长清以超越时代的法医知识，于蛛丝马迹中锁定疑犯，一日之后，在众人惊骇的目光中，当场指认出那位德高望重的翰林学士才是真凶！沈十六震惊：“你是如何仅凭几处尸斑，便断定其行凶手法的？”自此，一个洞悉人心、手握现代法医知识的“罪恶克星”，一个杀伐果断、执掌皇家利刃的“朝堂孤狼”，被迫捆绑。从“黄河浮尸案”到“鬼火勾魂案”，再到震惊朝野的“百官宴毒杀案”，他们发现，所有线索都指向了一个深藏于朝堂之上的神秘组织。
“沈大人，这天下，可不止锦衣卫一家在做‘清道夫’啊。”顾长清擦拭着手术刀，笑容玩味：“你负责杀人，我负责让尸体开口说话，这大虞朝的魑魅魍魉，咱们一网打尽","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/10e7a7c4d71b06d59f627ce716cadca3","author":"随你如风","author_id":"","book_id":"7574105399851240473","book_name":"大虞仵作","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#183050","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"8371人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":758,"name":"古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=758&name=古代&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":506,"name":"神探","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=506&name=神探&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":505,"name":"破案","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=505&name=破案&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7574107600535437849","read_count":"8371","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"982561"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.2","serial_count":"302","tags":"悬疑脑洞,古代,架空,神探,破案,穿越","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/b00df3cd1078ecf4bbac8f25bf6bc97d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779454605&x-signature=rj2Dy3zBz08%2FHyyG4dJAUtCqhB4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1653286474625149","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"65"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323205645138BF4DD4B7F911C2617"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后点评"},"sta
